description: Tenant Subscription Renewal Reminder - 7 Days Before Expiry

emailSubjectAllLocales.value: Reminder: Your Concord Subscription Renews in 7 Days

templateContentAllLocales.value:
Hello {{contactFirstName}} {{contactLastName}},

This is a friendly reminder that your Concord Commerce subscription will renew in 7 days.

Renewal Details

Plan: {{licensePackageDtls.packageName}}

Renewal Date: {{validTo}}

No action is required if you wish to continue your subscription.

Warm regards,

Team Concord Commerce
